name: Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green bell pepper, seeded and cut into chunks
1 scallion, with top, cut into large pieces
1/2 jalapeno pepper, seeded and minced (include seeds for a hotter salsa)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all the ingredients to a food processor fitted with the metal blade.
2. Pulse the mixture until it is coarsely chopped.
3. The salsa will keep in the refrigerator for up to one week.
Serves 6
Calories: 24 (per 1/2 cup)
Fat: 0 gm, 0% fat
